requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3, ICAO/IATA Air and IMDG Sea (Lithium Batteries)
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3、ICAO/IATA空运及IMDG海运（锂电池）
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3、ICAO/IATA空運及IMDG海運（鋰電池）

summary.en: Lithium batteries (cells, battery packs, and power banks) are classified as dangerous goods for transport purposes. For air transport to or within Japan, ICAO Technical Instructions and IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) apply, implemented domestically by the Civil Aeronautics Act and JCAB (Japan Civil Aviation Bureau); lithium-ion cells are UN 3480, batteries packed with or in equipment are UN 3481. For sea transport — the dominant route via Tokyo/Yokohama and Kobe — the IMDG Code applies, implemented in Japan through the Ship Safety Act and related Ministerial Ordinances (MLIT). All lithium batteries — regardless of origin — must have a valid UN 38.3 test report (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3: Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries) before transport. The UN 38.3 test covers altitude simulation, thermal test, vibration, shock, external short-circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, and forced discharge.
summary.zh: 锂电池（电芯、电池组及移动电源）在运输上被归类为危险货物。空运至日本或在日本境内进行空运时，须遵守ICAO技术细则及IATA危险品规则（DGR），在国内通过航空法及日本国土交通省航空局（JCAB）实施；锂离子电芯为UN 3480，随附设备包装或装入设备中的电池为UN 3481。海运（经东京/横滨及神户的主要路径）适用IMDG规则，在日本通过船舶安全法及相关省令（国土交通省MLIT）实施。所有锂电池——无论产地——在运输前须持有有效的UN 38.3测试报告（联合国危险货物运输试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节：金属锂及锂离子电池）。UN 38.3测试涵盖高度模拟、热测试、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充及强制放电。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（電芯、電池組及行動電源）在運輸上被歸類為危險貨物。空運至日本或在日本境內進行空運時，須遵守ICAO技術細則及IATA危險品規則（DGR），在國內透過航空法及日本國土交通省航空局（JCAB）實施；鋰離子電芯為UN 3480，隨附設備包裝或裝入設備中的電池為UN 3481。海運（經東京/橫濱及神戶的主要路徑）適用IMDG規則，在日本透過船舶安全法及相關省令（國土交通省MLIT）實施。所有鋰電池——無論產地——在運輸前須持有有效的UN 38.3測試報告（聯合國危險貨物運輸試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節：金屬鋰及鋰離子電池）。UN 38.3測試涵蓋高度模擬、熱測試、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充及強制放電。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 — implemented in Japan via the Ship Safety Act and Ministerial Ordinances (MLIT)
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air (Doc 9284) — implemented via the Civil Aeronautics Act (JCAB)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR), current edition — Section 3.9 (UN 3480 / UN 3481)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for all lithium batteries transported by air, consistent with ICAO and CAAC (Civil Aviation Administration of China) requirements. For domestic road transport, GB 12268 (Dangerous Goods List) and JT/T 617 (Road Transport of Dangerous Goods) apply. For sea transport, IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) requirements apply globally. Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries by air already typically obtain UN 38.3 test reports; however, the Japan-side implementing rules and documentation requirements (Civil Aeronautics Act / JCAB for air, Ship Safety Act / MLIT for sea, packing and marking inspections at Tokyo/Yokohama and Kobe) are additional obligations not mirrored in Chinese domestic transport rules.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有空运锂电池持有UN 38.3测试报告，符合ICAO及中国民用航空局（CAAC）要求。国内道路运输适用GB 12268（危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危险货物运输）。海运须遵守全球适用的IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）。出口商通常已为空运锂电池取得UN 38.3测试报告；但日本方面的实施规则及文件要求（空运的航空法/JCAB、海运的船舶安全法/MLIT、东京/横滨及神户的包装与标识检查）属于额外义务，在中国国内运输规则中无对应镜像。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有空運鋰電池持有UN 38.3測試報告，符合ICAO及中國民用航空局（CAAC）要求。國內道路運輸適用GB 12268（危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危險貨物運輸）。海運須遵守全球適用的IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）。出口商通常已為空運鋰電池取得UN 38.3測試報告；但日本方面的實施規則及文件要求（空運的航空法/JCAB、海運的船舶安全法/MLIT、東京/橫濱及神戶的包裝與標識檢查）屬於額外義務，在中國國內運輸規則中無對應鏡像。

standards_or_laws: GB 12268-2012 — List of dangerous goods (SAC/SAMR) — domestic road transport classification
JT/T 617-2018 — Road transport of dangerous goods — requirements (Ministry of Transport, PRC)
CAAC Order No. 55 — Provisions on the Transport of Dangerous Goods by Civil Aviation (CAAC)

gap.en: UN 38.3 test reports are required globally (air and sea) and most Chinese exporters already hold them. The Japan-specific gap is in the implementing transport regime: most China-to-Japan battery volume moves by sea, so IMDG Code compliance as implemented through Japan's Ship Safety Act and MLIT Ministerial Ordinances is the primary concern — packages must carry UN 3480/3481 markings and Class 9 lithium battery marks, with conforming dangerous-goods documentation accepted at Tokyo/Yokohama and Kobe. For air shipments via Narita/Haneda or Kansai, ICAO/IATA DGR state-of-charge limits (30% maximum for loose lithium-ion cells shipped as cargo) and JCAB requirements under the Civil Aeronautics Act apply. Exporters should confirm their UN 38.3 reports are from an accredited laboratory and cover the specific cell/pack configuration, and ensure Japan-side consignees and forwarders hold appropriate dangerous-goods handling capability.
gap.zh: UN 38.3测试报告为全球性要求（空运及海运），大多数中国出口商已持有。日本特有差距在于实施性运输制度：中国至日本的电池货量多经海运，因此通过日本船舶安全法及国土交通省（MLIT）省令实施的IMDG规则合规是首要关注——包装须粘贴UN 3480/3481标识及第9类锂电池标志，并备齐在东京/横滨及神户被接受的危险货物文件。经成田/羽田或关西机场空运时，须遵守ICAO/IATA DGR荷电状态限制（散装锂离子电芯作为货物运输时最高30%）及航空法下的JCAB要求。出口商应确认其UN 38.3报告来自认可实验室且涵盖具体电芯/电池组配置，并确保日本方收货人及货代具备相应危险货物处理能力。
gap.zht: UN 38.3測試報告為全球性要求（空運及海運），大多數中國出口商已持有。日本特有差距在於實施性運輸制度：中國至日本的電池貨量多經海運，因此透過日本船舶安全法及國土交通省（MLIT）省令實施的IMDG規則合規是首要關注——包裝須粘貼UN 3480/3481標識及第9類鋰電池標誌，並備齊在東京/橫濱及神戶被接受的危險貨物文件。經成田/羽田或關西機場空運時，須遵守ICAO/IATA DGR荷電狀態限制（散裝鋰離子電芯作為貨物運輸時最高30%）及航空法下的JCAB要求。出口商應確認其UN 38.3報告來自認可實驗室且涵蓋具體電芯/電池組配置，並確保日本方收貨人及貨代具備相應危險貨物處理能力。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all modes of transport (air, sea) globally; IMDG Code compliance mandatory for sea transport into Japan (Ship Safety Act / MLIT); ICAO/IATA DGR state-of-charge limits and JCAB requirements mandatory for air cargo (Civil Aeronautics Act)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required by CAAC for air transport; GB 12268 / JT/T 617 for domestic road transport; IMDG Code for sea transport

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 testing is a universal transport requirement — Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries to Japan must hold valid UN 38.3 test reports from accredited laboratories. Japan-specific additions are in the implementing regime: IMDG Code compliance via the Ship Safety Act and MLIT Ordinances for sea transport (the dominant route via Tokyo/Yokohama and Kobe), and ICAO/IATA DGR state-of-charge limits with JCAB requirements under the Civil Aeronautics Act for air cargo. Most compliant Chinese exporters already meet UN 38.3; the gap is typically in Japan-side dangerous-goods documentation and consignee handling capability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3测试为全球性运输要求——向日本出口锂电池的中国出口商须持有经认可实验室出具的有效UN 38.3测试报告。日本特有要求在于实施制度：海运须通过船舶安全法及国土交通省（MLIT）省令实施IMDG规则（经东京/横滨及神户的主要路径），空运货物须遵守ICAO/IATA DGR荷电状态限制及航空法下的JCAB要求。合规的中国出口商通常已满足UN 38.3；差距通常体现在日本方危险货物文件及收货人处理能力方面。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3測試為全球性運輸要求——向日本出口鋰電池的中國出口商須持有經認可實驗室出具的有效UN 38.3測試報告。日本特有要求在於實施制度：海運須透過船舶安全法及國土交通省（MLIT）省令實施IMDG規則（經東京/橫濱及神戶的主要路徑），空運貨物須遵守ICAO/IATA DGR荷電狀態限制及航空法下的JCAB要求。合規的中國出口商通常已滿足UN 38.3；差距通常體現在日本方危險貨物文件及收貨人處理能力方面。

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)
